policy.primary_use: SigLIP2 INT8 calibration and NNCF QAT for TAC-FUSE real-time sensor fusion vision
policy.scope: optional — accelerator training only, not required for core C2 operation

datasets.name: VisDrone2019-DET
datasets.rationale: Primary drone-view object detection corpus for people, vehicles, and traffic objects in aerial imagery.

datasets.name: DroneVehicle
datasets.rationale: Drone-mounted RGB/infrared vehicle detection data for command-and-control asset identification.
datasets.notes: HF dataset page is available, but full Dataset Viewer currently reports preview-only behavior.

datasets.name: Drone Detection Dataset
datasets.rationale: Supplemental COCO-style drone bounding boxes for positive drone detection and classifier calibration.

datasets.name: DOTA
datasets.rationale: Optional oriented-box aerial benchmark; use only if HF-native datasets overfit quickly.
